name: FctsIdsOnExchFedPaymtTransExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT DTL.GL_ON_EXCH_FED_PYMT_DTL_CK, DTL.ACCOUNTING_DT, DTL.PDBL_ACCT_CAT, DTL.FA_SUB_SRC_CD, DTL.EXCH_MBR_ID, DTL.FCTS_SUB_ID, DTL.COV_STRT_DT, DTL.COV_END_DT, DTL.GRGR_ID, DTL.GRGR_NAME, DTL.PDPD_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_BCBSFINOwner}.GL_ON_EXCH_FED_PYMT_DTL DTL) SELECT * FROM cte

Description:
JOB NAME:  FctsIdsOnExchFedPaymtTransExtr
Called By:FctsBcbsExtOnExchExtrLoadSeq

Process Description: Extract Data from (GL_ON_EXCH_FED_PYMT_DTL) and Load it to IDS
